title: StandardizedPartySubmission
description: Output of the Clerk Agent. Normalizes one party's raw legal filing into structured data for the Registrar Agent.

party_role.description: Which party this submission belongs to.

extracted_facts.description: Factual statements extracted from the document, each anchored to a source page.

verified.description: True if the statement text was found verbatim or near-verbatim in the source page.

issues_raised.description: Legal issues explicitly raised by this party.

cited_laws_and_cases.description: Statutes, rules, and case citations referenced by this party.

verified.description: True if this citation was found verbatim in the source document text.

prayers.description: Specific reliefs sought by this party.
